content:
[build-system]
requires = [
  "setuptools>=70.2.0",
]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "hipdnn-frontend"
# TODO: derive from hipDNN release version before publishing anywhere
# beyond the internal CI install-test loop. 0.0.1 will collide.
version = "0.0.1"
requires-python = ">=3.9"
description = "hipDNN Python bindings"
license = {text = "MIT"}

[[project.authors]]
name = "Advanced Micro Devices, Inc."
